title: Type Synonyms
learning_objective: Look up a value in an association list described by a type synonym, returning a Maybe.
hints: See the "Type synonyms" section of LYAH — Making Our Own Types and Typeclasses.
PhoneBook is just a synonym for [(String, String)] — it reads more clearly but behaves the same.
The Prelude function lookup already returns a Maybe; you can use it directly.
